docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANNE BATIK, REGIONAL PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN TREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,381.78 FILED BY PARK, NANETTE GUEUN AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN TREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY PARK, NANETTE GUEUN GREEN TREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MCGILL. PLAINTIFF NANETTE GUEUN PARK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREEN TREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANNE BATIK, REGIONAL PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK, NANETTE GUEUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN TREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. $170.58 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.58, LANDLORD / DEFENDANT TOOK PROMPT AND REASONABLE ACTION TO ABATE ANY PEST PROBLEM. AN OCCASIONAL ROACH IS NOT A LACK OF HABITABILITY AND DOES NOT REQUIRE TENANT TO VACATE. THE COURT FINDS THAT TENANT'S PURSE WAS DAMAGED DURING REPAIR PERIOD AND THAT TENANT WAS REQUIRED TO PURCHASE VARIOUS SPRAYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-31-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN TREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
